headline: Veeva Systems (VEEV) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Life sciences cloud software provider Veeva Systems (NYSE:VEEV) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday after market hours. Here’s what investors should know.

headline: Why Veeva Systems (VEEV) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of life sciences cloud software provider Veeva Systems (NYSE:VEEV) jumped 7.4% in the afternoon session after the company unveiled Falcon, a new artificial intelligence platform for drug development, and announced several major global customer commitments.
